name: Electrocuted by bad wiring on Boise site—who pays beyond comp?

mainEntity.name: Electrocuted by bad wiring on Boise site—who pays beyond comp?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Sue third-parties like contractors or manufacturers for negligence.** Idaho allows claims if they failed inspection duties.[2] Key factors: (1) Duty to safe equipment; (2) product liability for defects; (3) 2-year limit; (4) comp first.[2] Report OSHA, gather wiring photos, lawyer pursues all. Full recovery often from multiples.
